name: 05_metrics_single_contract_transport_dev_transport_tsrc_utbl_ref_inspection_due_dates_yearly
statement:
SELECT
  'contract' AS table_family,
  'transport_dev' AS catalog_name,
  'transport_tsrc' AS schema_name,
  'utbl_ref_inspection_due_dates_yearly' AS table_name,
  'MANAGED' AS table_type,
  COUNT(*) AS row_count,
  COUNT(*) > 0 AS has_rows,
  GREATEST(MAX(CASE WHEN try_cast(`DueDate` AS TIMESTAMP) <= current_timestamp() + INTERVAL 1 DAY THEN try_cast(`DueDate` AS TIMESTAMP) END), MAX(CASE WHEN try_cast(`EarliestStartDate-Annual` AS TIMESTAMP) <= current_timestamp() + INTERVAL 1 DAY THEN try_cast(`EarliestStartDate-Annual` AS TIMESTAMP) END), MAX(CASE WHEN try_cast(`EarliestStartDate->Annual` AS TIMESTAMP) <= current_timestamp() + INTERVAL 1 DAY THEN try_cast(`EarliestStartDate->Annual` AS TIMESTAMP) END)) AS latest_observed_ts,
  LEAST(MIN(CASE WHEN try_cast(`DueDate` AS TIMESTAMP) >= TIMESTAMP '1900-01-01 00:00:00' AND try_cast(`DueDate` AS TIMESTAMP) <= current_timestamp() + INTERVAL 1 DAY THEN try_cast(`DueDate` AS TIMESTAMP) END), MIN(CASE WHEN try_cast(`EarliestStartDate-Annual` AS TIMESTAMP) >= TIMESTAMP '1900-01-01 00:00:00' AND try_cast(`EarliestStartDate-Annual` AS TIMESTAMP) <= current_timestamp() + INTERVAL 1 DAY THEN try_cast(`EarliestStartDate-Annual` AS TIMESTAMP) END), MIN(CASE WHEN try_cast(`EarliestStartDate->Annual` AS TIMESTAMP) >= TIMESTAMP '1900-01-01 00:00:00' AND try_cast(`EarliestStartDate->Annual` AS TIMESTAMP) <= current_timestamp() + INTERVAL 1 DAY THEN try_cast(`EarliestStartDate->Annual` AS TIMESTAMP) END)) AS earliest_observed_ts,
  'DueDate|EarliestStartDate-Annual|EarliestStartDate->Annual' AS freshness_columns
FROM `transport_dev`.`transport_tsrc`.`utbl_ref_inspection_due_dates_yearly`
